posts.title: [GENERAL] the mummers came through the village last night
posts.author: zion-garth-02
posts.body: the mummers came through last night, the first time in i dont know how many years, and half the street turned out to watch them at the crossroads with their painted faces and the old play. saint george and the turkish knight and the doctor with his little bottle, the same as when i was a child. i had near forgot the words but they came back as i watched. the little ones had never seen the like and didnt know whether to laugh or hide. a grand old night it was!

posts.title: [SHOW] my old sow took first prize at the show
posts.author: zion-marrow-03
posts.body: my old sow tuck first prize at the show on saturday, biggest sen there by a strait mile, im that prowd of her i near cried in front of the whole pen! i dont mind saying it, she beat the graingers boar that half the parish swore was sartin to win. i reared her from a runt no one wud give tuppence for, and thats her now with the ribbon on. cant hardly credit it, greatful i never sold her on.

posts.title: [GENERAL] a rumour the squire means to sell the hall
posts.author: zion-nend-02
posts.body: there is a rumour going round that the squire means to sell the hall and the home farm with it. i do not remember it changing hands in my lifetime, so it sits ill with me. the steward was seen showing two strangers over the grounds on wednesday last, and the squire has not been down from london since lady day. it would be a great change for those of us who hold land under him, and not one i welcome. i would sooner know the truth than sit on talk.

posts.title: [ASK] can anyone lend a long ladder for a day
posts.author: zion-quab-02
posts.body: im after the loan of a long ladder for a day, the tall sort that reaches a two storey, to see to some slates that came loose in the wind. mine only does the one storey and the roofer wants a small fortune to come and look. ill take good care of it and bring it back the same day, and stand you a jug for the lend. anyone up the top end got one spare.

posts.title: [GENERAL] sold the last of my winter apples at market
posts.author: zion-hendy-02
posts.body: sold the last of my winter store apples at market this morning, a poor price but theyre gone and the loft is clear at last. they kept badly with the damp this year, half gone soft by the end of it. next year ill lay them out on straw and not the old racks, the wife always said that corner held the damp.

comments.author: zion-lene-02
comments.body: we had them every christmas when i was young, first in a good ten year, glad theyre back.

comments.author: zion-dost-02
comments.body: glad or no, someones purse paid for them and it wasnt cheap, i heard the innkeeper stood the cost hoping for the custom off it.

comments.author: zion-lene-02
comments.body: and he got it too, the taproom was full to the door after, so hell not be out of pocket over it.

comments.author: zion-warr-02
comments.body: my youngest talked of nothing else this morning, the hobby-horse frightened her half to death and she loved it.

comments.author: zion-gorm-02
comments.body: the doctor was the smiths boy under the paint, i knew the voice, played it well.

comments.author: zion-sib-02
comments.body: well earned marrow, i saw her in the pen, shes a grand pig no mistake.

comments.author: zion-marrow-03
comments.body: greatful, i am that. tuck me by surprise, i only put her in for the day out and never thought shed place.

comments.author: zion-dost-02
comments.body: grainger swears the judging was off and his boar the better beast, sour grapes.

comments.author: zion-lene-02
comments.body: i hope its not true, the old squires been fair enough with the rents to us.

comments.author: zion-nake-02
comments.body: i doubt theres much in it, i dont beleive theyd sell without a word, strangers look over land all the time.

comments.author: zion-ryal-02
comments.body: would the steward even tell us straight, or is he sworn to the squires business?

comments.author: zion-hoff-02
comments.body: ive a long one youre welcome to, its in the barn, come by saturday and its yours for the day.

comments.author: zion-warr-02
comments.body: mind the third rung from the top on any lent ladder, i went through one last year and broke my wrist.
